name: chemsketcher
description: Ketcher-based desktop chemical structure editor with a live physicochemical property table (RDKit backend)
author: yjzhng (https://github.com/yjzhng)
//appConfig: Single source of truth for app identity + ports (OneProduction convention). Everything else derives from this — do not hard-code these values elsewhere.

appConfig.//python: The self-contained CPython used when the machine has no suitable native Python (dev: ensure-venv.sh) or always (packaged app: electron/pythonEnv.cjs). Pinned so both paths provision the SAME interpreter. Bump both fields together — see github.com/astral-sh/python-build-standalone/releases.
